creator: lumiwa@gmail.com
text:
I have the same problem:

gnome-system-monitor

(<unknown>:91004): glibmm-CRITICAL **: 
unhandled exception (type Glib::Error) in signal handler:
domain: g-io-error-quark
code  : 0
what  : Unable to find default local directory monitor type

LibGTop-Server: pid 91005 received eof.

My system:

FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE #0 r286666: Wed Aug 12 15:26:37 UTC 2015     root@releng1.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
GNOME 3.16
